name: Inscribe
long_description:
Inscribe is AI-powered document fraud detection software for banks, credit unions, and lenders. It detects forged, fabricated, and AI-generated financial documents (including deepfake bank statements, manipulated pay stubs, and synthetic tax forms) in seconds, giving risk teams the clarity they need to stop fraud without slowing approvals.

Inscribe created the document fraud detection category and has been purpose-built for financial institutions since 2017. Our agentic AI is trained on millions of real-world applications and strengthened by in-house data scientists and fraud experts. According to Inscribe's 2026 State of Document Fraud Report, 1 in 16 documents show signs of fraud — with AI-generated document fraud growing 5x from April to December 2025.

Customers include BCU ($5.6M in prevented fraud losses), Logix Federal Credit Union ($3M in losses prevented in 8 months), and Ramp (30-minute reduction in application processing). Inscribe is SOC 2 Type II and ISO 27001 certified, and is backed by Threshold Ventures, Uncork Capital, Y Combinator, Crosslink Capital, and Foundry.
one_liner: AI Document Fraud Detection for Banks, Credit Unions & Lenders
